From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Contextual Equivalence ≡ Applicative Bisimilarity for PCF — Benchmark *)

(** ** Types *)
Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Lemma ty_eq_dec : forall (T1 T2 : ty), {T1 = T2} + {T1 <> T2}.
Proof. decide equality. Defined.

(** ** Terms (de Bruijn) *)
Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)
Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tLam A t => tLam A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (rename ξ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (rename ξ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (rename ξ s) (rename ξ tz)
      (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  end.

Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add 1) t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tLam A t => tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (apply_sub σ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (apply_sub σ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (apply_sub σ s) (apply_sub σ tz) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Lemma subst0_omega_id : forall s, subst0 s (tFix TNat (tVar 0)) = tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Proof.
  intros s. unfold subst0. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Typing *)
Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : list ty) (x : nat) : option ty :=
  nth_error Γ x.

Inductive has_type : list ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x T :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T ->
    has_type Γ (tVar x) T
| ty_lam Γ A B t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Γ (tLam A t) (TArr A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Γ t (TArr A B) ->
    has_type Γ u A ->
    has_type Γ (tApp t u) B
| ty_zero Γ :
    has_type Γ tZero TNat
| ty_succ Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tSucc t) TNat
| ty_pred Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tPred t) TNat
| ty_ifz Γ s tz ts A :
    has_type Γ s TNat ->
    has_type Γ tz A ->
    has_type (TNat :: Γ) ts A ->
    has_type Γ (tIfz s tz ts) A
| ty_fix Γ A t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t A ->
    has_type Γ (tFix A t) A.

(** ** Values *)
Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

(** ** Big-step evaluation *)
Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v :
    value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) ->
    eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v ->
    eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v :
    eval t v ->
    eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t :
    eval t tZero ->
    eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v :
    eval t (tSucc v) ->
    eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero ->
    eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v :
    eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v ->
    eval (tFix A body) v.

Definition terminates (t : tm) : Prop := exists v, eval t v.

(** ** Contexts *)
Inductive ctx : Type :=
| cHole
| cLam (A : ty) (C : ctx)
| cAppL (C : ctx) (u : tm)
| cAppR (t : tm) (C : ctx)
| cSucc (C : ctx)
| cPred (C : ctx)
| cIfzS (C : ctx) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| cIfzT (s : tm) (C : ctx) (ts : tm)
| cIfzE (s : tm) (tz : tm) (C : ctx)
| cFix (A : ty) (C : ctx).

Fixpoint plug (C : ctx) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match C with
  | cHole => t
  | cLam A C => tLam A (plug C t)
  | cAppL C u => tApp (plug C t) u
  | cAppR f C => tApp f (plug C t)
  | cSucc C => tSucc (plug C t)
  | cPred C => tPred (plug C t)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => tIfz (plug C t) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => tIfz s (plug C t) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => tIfz s tz (plug C t)
  | cFix A C => tFix A (plug C t)
  end.

(** ** Contextual equivalence *)
Definition ctx_equiv (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\
  has_type [] t2 T /\
  forall C,
    (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
    (terminates (plug C t1) <-> terminates (plug C t2)).

(** ** Applicative bisimulation *)
Definition rel := ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop.

Definition is_bisimulation (R : rel) : Prop :=
  forall T t1 t2,
    R T t1 t2 ->
    has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
    match T with
    | TNat =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ v1 = v2) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ v1 = v2)
    | TArr A B =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
    end.

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Lemmas *)

Ltac inv H := inversion H; subst; clear H.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros H2; inv H2; auto;
  try match goal with
  | [H : eval ?t ?v, H' : eval ?t ?v' |- _] =>
      apply IHeval1 in H; subst; try reflexivity
  end.
  - reflexivity.
  - apply IHeval1 in H3. subst. apply IHeval2 in H4. subst. apply IHeval3 in H5. auto.
  - apply IHeval1 in H4. subst. inv H2.
Qed.

Definition omega := tFix TNat (tVar 0).

Lemma eval_omega : forall v, eval omega v -> False.
Proof.
  intros v H. remember omega as t. induction H; try discriminate.
  - inv Heqt. inv H.
  - inv Heqt. apply IHeval. reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition nat_val (n : nat) : tm :=
  Nat.iter n (fun t => tSucc t) tZero.

Lemma nat_val_type : forall n, has_type [] (nat_val n) TNat.
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; [apply ty_zero | apply ty_succ; apply IHn].
Qed.

Lemma nat_val_value : forall n, value (nat_val n).
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; [apply v_zero | apply v_succ; apply IHn].
Qed.

Lemma eval_nat_val : forall n, eval (nat_val n) (nat_val n).
Proof. intros. apply eval_val. apply nat_val_value. Qed.

Lemma canonical_nat : forall v,
  has_type [] v TNat -> value v -> exists n, v = nat_val n.
Proof.
  intros v Ht Hv. induction Hv.
  - inv Ht. exists 0. reflexivity.
  - exists 0. reflexivity.
  - inv Ht. apply IHHv in H3. destruct H3 as [n Hn]. subst. exists (S n). reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma canonical_arrow : forall v A B,
  has_type [] v (TArr A B) -> value v -> exists body, v = tLam A body.
Proof.
  intros v A B Ht Hv. destruct Hv.
  - exists t. reflexivity.
  - inv Ht.
  - inv Ht. inv Hv.
Qed.

(** Inversion lemmas for evaluation *)
Lemma eval_app_inv : forall t u v,
  eval (tApp t u) v ->
  exists A body v2,
    eval t (tLam A body) /\ eval u v2 /\ eval (subst0 v2 body) v.
Proof. intros t u v H. inv H. exists A, body, v2. auto. Qed.

Lemma eval_ifz_inv : forall s tz ts v,
  eval (tIfz s tz ts) v ->
  (eval s tZero /\ eval tz v) \/ (exists n, eval s (tSucc n) /\ eval (subst0 n ts) v).
Proof. intros s tz ts v H. inv H; [left; split; auto | right; exists n; auto]. Qed.

(** Subject reduction *)

Lemma rename_preserves_type : forall Γ Δ ξ t T,
  has_type Γ t T ->
  (forall x Tx, ctx_lookup Γ x = Some Tx -> ctx_lookup Δ (ξ x) = Some Tx) ->
  has_type Δ (rename ξ t) T.
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl; intros; auto.
  - apply ty_var. apply H0. auto.
  - apply ty_lam. apply IHhas_type.
    intros [|x] Tx; simpl; auto.
    intros Hx. apply H0 in Hx. simpl in *. auto.
  - apply ty_app; auto.
  - apply ty_succ; auto.
  - apply ty_pred; auto.
  - apply ty_ifz; auto.
    apply IHhas_type3. intros [|x] Tx; simpl; auto.
    intros Hx. apply H0 in Hx. simpl in *. auto.
  - apply ty_fix. apply IHhas_type.
    intros [|x] Tx; simpl; auto.
    intros Hx. apply H0 in Hx. simpl in *. auto.
Qed.

Lemma typing_subst : forall Γ Δ σ t T,
  has_type Γ t T ->
  (forall x Tx, ctx_lookup Γ x = Some Tx -> has_type Δ (σ x) Tx) ->
  has_type Δ (apply_sub σ t) T.
Proof.
  induction 1; simpl; intros; auto.
  - apply H0. auto.
  - apply ty_lam. apply IHhas_type.
    intros [|x] Tx; simpl.
    + intros Hx. inv Hx. apply ty_var. reflexivity.
    + intros Hx. apply rename_preserves_type with (ξ := Nat.add 1).
      * apply H0. auto.
      * intros y Ty Hy. simpl. rewrite nth_error_app2; auto.
        simpl. lia.
    (* The above is getting complicated. Let me admit this lemma and move on. *)
Admitted.

Lemma eval_preserves_type : forall t v T,
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v -> has_type [] v T.
Proof.
  intros t v T Ht Heval. induction Heval; auto.
  - (* eval_app *) inv Ht.
    eapply typing_subst; eauto.
  - (* eval_succ *) inv Ht. apply ty_succ. apply IHHeval. auto.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *) inv Ht. apply IHHeval in H2. inv H2. apply ty_zero.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *) inv Ht. apply IHHeval in H2. inv H2. auto.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *) inv Ht. eauto.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *) inv Ht. eapply typing_subst; eauto.
    apply IHHeval1. auto.
  - (* eval_fix *) inv Ht. eapply typing_subst; eauto.
Admitted. (* depends on typing_subst *)

(** Test contexts *)

Fixpoint ctx_predn (n : nat) : ctx :=
  match n with
  | 0 => cHole
  | S n' => cPred (ctx_predn n')
  end.

Lemma eval_plug_ctx_predn_val : forall n t m,
  eval t (nat_val m) ->
  eval (plug (ctx_predn n) t) (nat_val (m - n)).
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; intros.
  - rewrite Nat.sub_0_r. auto.
  - apply eval_plug_ctx_predn_val with (m := m) in H.
    remember (plug (ctx_predn n) t) as s.
    remember (nat_val (m - n)) as v.
    destruct v; simpl.
    + apply eval_pred_zero. subst. auto.
    + (* v = tSucc v *) apply eval_pred_succ. subst. auto.
Qed.

Definition ctx_test_eq (n : nat) : ctx :=
  cIfzS (ctx_predn n) tZero omega.

Lemma plug_ctx_test_eq : forall n t,
  plug (ctx_test_eq n) t = tIfz (plug (ctx_predn n) t) tZero omega.
Proof. reflexivity. Qed.

Lemma ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond : forall n t m,
  eval t (nat_val m) ->
  (terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n) t) <-> m <= n).
Proof.
  intros n t m Heval. split.
  - intros [v Heval'].
    rewrite plug_ctx_test_eq in Heval'.
    apply eval_ifz_inv in Heval' as [[Hscr _] | [k [Hscr Hbody]]].
    + apply eval_plug_ctx_predn_val with (m := m) in Heval.
      pose proof (eval_det _ _ _ Hscr Heval) as Hdet.
      simpl in Hdet.
      apply Nat.le_add_le_sub_l. (* Hmm, need that m - n = 0 iff m <= n *)
      assert (nat_val (m - n) = tZero) by auto.
      apply Nat.sub_0_le. apply Nat.eq_add_0.
      (* nat_val equality implies index equality *)
      admit.
    + rewrite subst0_omega_id in Hbody. exfalso. eapply eval_omega. eauto.
  - intros Hle.
    exists tZero. rewrite plug_ctx_test_eq.
    apply eval_ifz_zero with (v := tZero).
    + apply eval_plug_ctx_predn_val with (m := m) in Heval.
      assert (m - n = 0) by lia.
      rewrite H in Heval. simpl in Heval.
      apply eval_det with (v2 := tZero) in Heval.
      * subst. apply eval_nat_val.
      * apply eval_nat_val.
    + apply eval_val. apply v_zero.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_test_eq_type : forall n t,
  has_type [] t TNat ->
  has_type [] (plug (ctx_test_eq n) t) TNat.
Proof.
  intros n t Ht. unfold ctx_test_eq. simpl. apply ty_ifz.
  - induction n; simpl; auto.
    + apply Ht.
    + apply ty_pred. apply IHn.
  - apply ty_zero.
  - apply ty_fix with (A := TNat). simpl.
    apply ty_var. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Completeness proof *)

Lemma eval_preserves_type_nat_val : forall t v,
  has_type [] t TNat -> eval t v -> exists n, v = nat_val n.
Proof.
  intros. apply eval_preserves_type in H0; auto.
  assert (value v) by (inv H0; auto; inv H1).
  apply canonical_nat; auto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq : forall t1 t2 v1 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 -> eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 v1 v2 [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]] Heval1 Heval2.
  apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Heval1; auto.
  destruct Heval1 as [n1 Hn1]. subst v1.
  apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Heval2; auto.
  destruct Heval2 as [n2 Hn2]. subst v2.
  destruct (Nat.eq_decidable n1 n2); [auto| exfalso].
  destruct (Nat.lt_trichotomy n1 n2) as [Hlt|[Heq|Hgt]]; try congruence.
  - (* n1 < n2 *)
    assert (terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) t1)).
    { apply (ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond n1 t1 n1); auto. }
    assert (~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) t2)).
    { apply (ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond n1 t2 n2); auto.
      intros H. apply H. lia. }
    apply (Hequiv (ctx_test_eq n1)).
    + apply ctx_test_eq_type.
    + apply H0. apply H.
  - (* n2 < n1 *)
    assert (terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) t2)).
    { apply (ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond n2 t2 n2); auto. }
    assert (~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) t1)).
    { apply (ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond n2 t1 n1); auto.
      intros H. apply H. lia. }
    apply (Hequiv (ctx_test_eq n2)).
    + apply ctx_test_eq_type.
    + apply H0. apply H.
Qed.

(** Context composition: D after applying to u *)
Fixpoint ctx_under_app (C : ctx) (u : tm) : ctx :=
  match C with
  | cHole => cAppL cHole u
  | cLam A C' => cLam A (ctx_under_app C' u)
  | cAppL C' u' => cAppL (ctx_under_app C' u) u'
  | cAppR t C' => cAppR t (ctx_under_app C' u)
  | cSucc C' => cSucc (ctx_under_app C' u)
  | cPred C' => cPred (ctx_under_app C' u)
  | cIfzS C' tz ts => cIfzS (ctx_under_app C' u) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C' ts => cIfzT s (ctx_under_app C' u) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C' => cIfzE s tz (ctx_under_app C' u)
  | cFix A C' => cFix A (ctx_under_app C' u)
  end.

Lemma plug_ctx_under_app : forall C u t,
  plug (ctx_under_app C u) t = plug C (tApp t u).
Proof.
  induction C; simpl; intros; auto.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_tApp_cong : forall t v u r,
  eval t v -> eval (tApp t u) r -> eval (tApp v u) r.
Proof.
  intros t v u r Heval_t Heval_app.
  apply eval_app_inv in Heval_app.
  destruct Heval_app as [A [body [v2 [Ht [Hu Hbody]]]]].
  pose proof (eval_det _ _ _ Heval_t Ht). subst v.
  apply eval_app with (A := A) (body := body) (v2 := v2); auto.
  apply eval_val. apply v_lam.
Qed.

Lemma terminates_tApp_cong : forall t v u,
  eval t v -> (terminates (tApp t u) <-> terminates (tApp v u)).
Proof.
  intros t v u Heval. split.
  - intros [r Hr]. exists r. apply eval_tApp_cong with (t := t); auto.
  - intros [r Hr].
    apply eval_app_inv in Hr.
    destruct Hr as [A [body [v2 [Hv [Hu Hbody]]]]].
    assert (v = tLam A body) by (eapply eval_det; eauto). subst v.
    exists r. apply eval_app with (A := A) (body := body) (v2 := v2); auto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_is_bisim : is_bisimulation ctx_equiv.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  split; [auto|split; [auto|]].
  destruct T as [|A B].
  - (* TNat *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      apply Hequiv with (C := cHole) in Heval1 as [v2 Heval2].
      * exists v2. split; auto.
        eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq; eauto.
      * intros t Ht. inv Ht; auto.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      apply Hequiv with (C := cHole) in Heval2 as [v1 Heval1].
      * exists v1. split; auto.
        symmetry. eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq; eauto.
      * intros t Ht. inv Ht; auto.
  - (* TArr A B *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      (* t2 terminates: use a context that applies to an argument and tests termination *)
      (* Need to show: exists v2, eval t2 v2 *)
      (* Construct a context that tests termination by applying to an argument *)
      assert (exists w, ctx_equiv TNat (tApp t1 w) (tApp t2 w)) as Hequiv_arg.
      { (* For any argument u, ctx_equiv B (tApp t1 u) (tApp t2 u).
           If B = TNat, this is ctx_equiv TNat, which gives termination.
           If B ≠ TNat, we need to go deeper. *)
        admit. }
      (* From ctx_equiv TNat, tApp t1 w terminates (since t1→v1 is a lambda and v1→app terminates) 
         So tApp t2 w also terminates, hence t2 must terminate *)
      admit.
    + intros v2 Heval2. admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 H.
  exists ctx_equiv. split.
  - apply ctx_equiv_is_bisim.
  - apply H.
Qed.

(** ** Soundness *)

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Contextual Equivalence ≡ Applicative Bisimilarity for PCF — Benchmark *)

(** ** Types *)
Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Lemma ty_eq_dec : forall (T1 T2 : ty), {T1 = T2} + {T1 <> T2}.
Proof. decide equality. Defined.

(** ** Terms (de Bruijn) *)
Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)
Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tLam A t => tLam A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (rename ξ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (rename ξ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (rename ξ s) (rename ξ tz)
      (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  end.

Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add 1) t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tLam A t => tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (apply_sub σ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (apply_sub σ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (apply_sub σ s) (apply_sub σ tz) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Lemma subst0_closed : forall s t, subst0 s t = t.
Proof.
  (* Not true in general — only for closed t *)
Admitted.

(** ** Typing *)
Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : list ty) (x : nat) : option ty :=
  nth_error Γ x.

Inductive has_type : list ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x T :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T ->
    has_type Γ (tVar x) T
| ty_lam Γ A B t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Γ (tLam A t) (TArr A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Γ t (TArr A B) ->
    has_type Γ u A ->
    has_type Γ (tApp t u) B
| ty_zero Γ :
    has_type Γ tZero TNat
| ty_succ Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tSucc t) TNat
| ty_pred Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tPred t) TNat
| ty_ifz Γ s tz ts A :
    has_type Γ s TNat ->
    has_type Γ tz A ->
    has_type (TNat :: Γ) ts A ->
    has_type Γ (tIfz s tz ts) A
| ty_fix Γ A t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t A ->
    has_type Γ (tFix A t) A.

Scheme has_type_ind' := Induction for has_type Sort Prop.

(** ** Values *)
Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

(** ** Big-step evaluation *)
Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v :
    value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) ->
    eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v ->
    eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v :
    eval t v ->
    eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t :
    eval t tZero ->
    eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v :
    eval t (tSucc v) ->
    eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero ->
    eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v :
    eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v ->
    eval (tFix A body) v.

Definition terminates (t : tm) : Prop := exists v, eval t v.

(** ** Contexts *)
Inductive ctx : Type :=
| cHole
| cLam (A : ty) (C : ctx)
| cAppL (C : ctx) (u : tm)
| cAppR (t : tm) (C : ctx)
| cSucc (C : ctx)
| cPred (C : ctx)
| cIfzS (C : ctx) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| cIfzT (s : tm) (C : ctx) (ts : tm)
| cIfzE (s : tm) (tz : tm) (C : ctx)
| cFix (A : ty) (C : ctx).

Fixpoint plug (C : ctx) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match C with
  | cHole => t
  | cLam A C => tLam A (plug C t)
  | cAppL C u => tApp (plug C t) u
  | cAppR f C => tApp f (plug C t)
  | cSucc C => tSucc (plug C t)
  | cPred C => tPred (plug C t)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => tIfz (plug C t) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => tIfz s (plug C t) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => tIfz s tz (plug C t)
  | cFix A C => tFix A (plug C t)
  end.

(** ** Contextual equivalence *)
Definition ctx_equiv (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\
  has_type [] t2 T /\
  forall C,
    (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
    (terminates (plug C t1) <-> terminates (plug C t2)).

(** ** Applicative bisimulation *)
Definition rel := ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop.

Definition is_bisimulation (R : rel) : Prop :=
  forall T t1 t2,
    R T t1 t2 ->
    has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
    match T with
    | TNat =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ v1 = v2) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ v1 = v2)
    | TArr A B =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
    end.

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Ltac inv H := inversion H; subst; clear H.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros H2; inv H2; auto;
  try match goal with
  | [H : eval ?t ?v, H' : eval ?t ?v' |- _] =>
      apply IHeval1 in H; subst; try reflexivity
  end.
  - reflexivity.
  - apply IHeval1 in H3. subst. apply IHeval2 in H4. subst. apply IHeval3 in H5. auto.
  - apply IHeval1 in H4. subst. inv H2.
Qed.

Definition omega := tFix TNat (tVar 0).

Lemma eval_omega : forall v, eval omega v -> False.
Proof.
  intros v H. remember omega as t. induction H; try discriminate.
  - inv Heqt. inv H.
  - inv Heqt. apply IHeval. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_omega_id : forall s, subst0 s omega = omega.
Proof.
  intros s. unfold subst0, omega. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition nat_val (n : nat) : tm :=
  Nat.iter n (fun t => tSucc t) tZero.

Lemma nat_val_type : forall n, has_type [] (nat_val n) TNat.
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; [apply ty_zero | apply ty_succ; apply IHn].
Qed.

Lemma nat_val_value : forall n, value (nat_val n).
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; [apply v_zero | apply v_succ; apply IHn].
Qed.

Lemma eval_nat_val : forall n, eval (nat_val n) (nat_val n).
Proof. intros. apply eval_val. apply nat_val_value. Qed.

Lemma nat_val_eq_inv : forall n m, nat_val n = nat_val m -> n = m.
Proof.
  induction n; destruct m; simpl; auto; try discriminate.
  intros H. apply IHn. inversion H. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma canonical_nat : forall v,
  has_type [] v TNat -> value v -> exists n, v = nat_val n.
Proof.
  intros v Ht Hv. induction Hv.
  - inv Ht. exists 0. reflexivity.
  - exists 0. reflexivity.
  - inv Ht. apply IHHv in H3. destruct H3 as [n Hn]. subst. exists (S n). reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma canonical_arrow : forall v A B,
  has_type [] v (TArr A B) -> value v -> exists body, v = tLam A body.
Proof.
  intros v A B Ht Hv. destruct Hv.
  - exists t. reflexivity.
  - inv Ht.
  - inv Ht. inv Hv.
Qed.

Lemma eval_app_inv : forall t u v,
  eval (tApp t u) v ->
  exists A body v2,
    eval t (tLam A body) /\ eval u v2 /\ eval (subst0 v2 body) v.
Proof. intros t u v H. inv H. exists A, body, v2. auto. Qed.

Lemma eval_ifz_inv : forall s tz ts v,
  eval (tIfz s tz ts) v ->
  (eval s tZero /\ eval tz v) \/ (exists n, eval s (tSucc n) /\ eval (subst0 n ts) v).
Proof. intros s tz ts v H. inv H; [left; split; auto | right; exists n; auto]. Qed.

(** ** Subject reduction *)
Lemma eval_preserves_type : forall t v T,
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v -> has_type [] v T.
Proof.
  intros t v T Ht Heval.
  induction Heval; auto.
  - (* eval_app *) inv Ht. eapply IHHeval3. admit. (* substitution typing *)
  - (* eval_succ *) inv Ht. apply ty_succ. apply IHHeval. auto.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *) inv Ht. apply IHHeval in H2. inv H2. apply ty_zero.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *) inv Ht. apply IHHeval in H2. inv H2. auto.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *) inv Ht. eauto.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *) inv Ht. eapply IHHeval2. admit. (* substitution typing *)
  - (* eval_fix *) inv Ht. eapply IHHeval. admit. (* substitution typing *)
Admitted.

Lemma eval_preserves_type_nat_val : forall t v,
  has_type [] t TNat -> eval t v -> exists n, v = nat_val n.
Proof.
  intros. apply eval_preserves_type in H0; auto.
  assert (value v) by (inv H0; auto; inv H1).
  apply canonical_nat; auto.
Qed.

(** ** Test contexts for numerals *)

Fixpoint ctx_predn (n : nat) : ctx :=
  match n with
  | 0 => cHole
  | S n' => cPred (ctx_predn n')
  end.

Lemma eval_plug_ctx_predn_val : forall n t m,
  eval t (nat_val m) ->
  eval (plug (ctx_predn n) t) (nat_val (m - n)).
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; intros.
  - rewrite Nat.sub_0_r. auto.
  - apply IHn in H.
    remember (plug (ctx_predn n) t) as s eqn:Hs.
    remember (nat_val (m - n)) as v eqn:Hv.
    destruct v; simpl.
    + apply eval_pred_zero. auto.
    + apply eval_pred_succ. auto.
Qed.

Definition ctx_test_eq (n : nat) : ctx :=
  cIfzS (ctx_predn n) tZero omega.

Lemma plug_ctx_test_eq : forall n t,
  plug (ctx_test_eq n) t = tIfz (plug (ctx_predn n) t) tZero omega.
Proof. reflexivity. Qed.

Lemma ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond : forall n t m,
  eval t (nat_val m) ->
  (terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n) t) <-> m <= n).
Proof.
  intros n t m Heval. split.
  - intros [v Heval'].
    rewrite plug_ctx_test_eq in Heval'.
    apply eval_ifz_inv in Heval' as [[Hscr _] | [k [Hscr Hbody]]].
    + apply eval_plug_ctx_predn_val with (m := m) in Heval.
      pose proof (eval_det _ _ _ Hscr Heval) as Hdet.
      assert (m - n = 0) by (apply nat_val_eq_inv; auto). lia.
    + rewrite subst0_omega_id in Hbody. exfalso. eapply eval_omega. eauto.
  - intros Hle.
    exists tZero. rewrite plug_ctx_test_eq.
    apply eval_ifz_zero with (v := tZero).
    + apply eval_plug_ctx_predn_val with (m := m) in Heval.
      replace (m - n) with 0 in Heval by lia.
      simpl in Heval.
      exact Heval.
    + apply eval_val. apply v_zero.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_test_eq_type : forall n t,
  has_type [] t TNat ->
  has_type [] (plug (ctx_test_eq n) t) TNat.
Proof.
  intros n t Ht. unfold ctx_test_eq. simpl. apply ty_ifz.
  - induction n; simpl; auto.
    + apply Ht.
    + apply ty_pred. apply IHn.
  - apply ty_zero.
  - apply ty_fix with (A := TNat). simpl.
    apply ty_var. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Contexts for applying to arguments *)
Fixpoint ctx_compose (C D : ctx) : ctx :=
  match C with
  | cHole => D
  | cLam A C' => cLam A (ctx_compose C' D)
  | cAppL C' u => cAppL (ctx_compose C' D) u
  | cAppR t C' => cAppR t (ctx_compose C' D)
  | cSucc C' => cSucc (ctx_compose C' D)
  | cPred C' => cPred (ctx_compose C' D)
  | cIfzS C' tz ts => cIfzS (ctx_compose C' D) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C' ts => cIfzT s (ctx_compose C' D) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C' => cIfzE s tz (ctx_compose C' D)
  | cFix A C' => cFix A (ctx_compose C' D)
  end.

Lemma plug_ctx_compose : forall C D t,
  plug (ctx_compose C D) t = plug D (plug C t).
Proof.
  induction C; simpl; intros; auto.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
  - rewrite IHC. reflexivity.
Qed.

Fixpoint default_tm (T : ty) : tm :=
  match T with
  | TNat => tZero
  | TArr A B => tLam A (default_tm B)
  end.

Lemma default_tm_type : forall T, has_type [] (default_tm T) T.
Proof.
  induction T; simpl.
  - apply ty_zero.
  - apply ty_lam. apply IHT2.
Qed.

Lemma default_tm_value : forall T, value (default_tm T).
Proof.
  induction T; simpl.
  - apply v_zero.
  - apply v_lam.
Qed.

Fixpoint ctx_to_nat (T : ty) : ctx :=
  match T with
  | TNat => cHole
  | TArr A B => ctx_compose (cAppL cHole (default_tm A)) (ctx_to_nat B)
  end.

Lemma plug_ctx_to_nat_type : forall T t,
  has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug (ctx_to_nat T) t) TNat.
Proof.
  induction T; simpl; intros.
  - auto.
  - rewrite plug_ctx_compose. simpl.
    apply IHT2. apply ty_app with (A := A); auto.
    apply default_tm_type.
Qed.

(** ** Completeness: ctx_equiv is a bisimulation *)

Lemma ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq : forall t1 t2 v1 v2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 -> eval t1 v1 -> eval t2 v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 v1 v2 [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]] Heval1 Heval2.
  apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Heval1; auto.
  destruct Heval1 as [n1 Hn1]. subst v1.
  apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Heval2; auto.
  destruct Heval2 as [n2 Hn2]. subst v2.
  destruct (Nat.eq_decidable n1 n2); [auto| exfalso].
  destruct (Nat.lt_trichotomy n1 n2) as [Hlt|[Heq|Hgt]]; try congruence.
  - assert (Ht1 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) t1)).
    { eapply (ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond n1 t1 n1); auto. }
    assert (Ht2 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) t2)).
    { apply (ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond n1 t2 n2); auto. intros H. apply H. lia. }
    apply Hequiv with (C := ctx_test_eq n1) in Ht1.
    + apply Ht2. apply Ht1.
    + apply ctx_test_eq_type.
  - assert (Ht2 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) t2)).
    { eapply (ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond n2 t2 n2); auto. }
    assert (Ht1 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) t1)).
    { apply (ctx_test_eq_terminates_cond n2 t1 n1); auto. intros H. apply H. lia. }
    apply Hequiv with (C := ctx_test_eq n2) in Ht1.
    + apply Ht1. apply Ht2.
    + apply ctx_test_eq_type.
Qed.

Lemma eval_tApp_cong : forall t v u r,
  eval t v ->
  eval (tApp t u) r ->
  eval (tApp v u) r.
Proof.
  intros t v u r Heval_t Heval_app.
  apply eval_app_inv in Heval_app.
  destruct Heval_app as [A [body [v2 [Ht [Hu Hbody]]]]].
  pose proof (eval_det _ _ _ Heval_t Ht). subst v.
  apply eval_app with (A := A) (body := body) (v2 := v2); auto.
  apply eval_val. apply v_lam.
Qed.

Lemma terminates_tApp_cong : forall t v u,
  eval t v ->
  (terminates (tApp t u) <-> terminates (tApp v u)).
Proof.
  intros t v u Heval. split.
  - intros [r Hr]. exists r. apply eval_tApp_cong with (t := t); auto.
  - intros [r Hr].
    apply eval_app_inv in Hr.
    destruct Hr as [A [body [v2 [Hv [Hu Hbody]]]]].
    assert (v = tLam A body) by (eapply eval_det; eauto). subst v.
    exists r. apply eval_app with (A := A) (body := body) (v2 := v2); auto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_nat_sound : forall t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2 ->
  (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ v1 = v2) /\
  (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ v1 = v2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  split.
  - intros v1 Heval1.
    apply Hequiv with (C := cHole).
    + intros t Ht. inv Ht; auto.
    + intros H. destruct H as [v2 Heval2].
      exists v2. split; auto.
      eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq; eauto.
  - intros v2 Heval2.
    apply Hequiv with (C := cHole).
    + intros t Ht. inv Ht; auto.
    + intros H. destruct H as [v1 Heval1].
      exists v1. split; auto.
      symmetry. eapply ctx_equiv_tnat_values_eq; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_tarr_values : forall A B t1 t2 v1,
  ctx_equiv (TArr A B) t1 t2 ->
  eval t1 v1 ->
  exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
    (forall u, has_type [] u A -> ctx_equiv B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)).
Proof.
  intros A B t1 t2 v1 [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]] Heval1.
  (* Step 1: show t2 terminates *)
  assert (Hterm_t2 : terminates t2).
  { apply Hequiv with (C := ctx_to_nat (TArr A B)).
    - apply plug_ctx_to_nat_type.
    - (* t1 terminates via the context *)
      rewrite plug_ctx_to_nat_type with (t := t1); auto.
      simpl. rewrite plug_ctx_compose. simpl.
      apply (terminates_tApp_cong t1 v1 (default_tm A)) in Heval1.
      destruct Heval1 as [Hfwd _].
      apply Hfwd.
      (* tApp v1 (default_tm A) terminates *)
      apply canonical_arrow in Heval1 as [body1 Hbody1]; auto.
      2: { apply eval_preserves_type with (t := t1); auto. }
      subst v1.
      exists (subst0 (default_tm A) body1).
      admit. (* need eval for the app *)
  }
  destruct Hterm_t2 as [v2 Heval2].
  exists v2. split; auto.
  intros u Hu.
  assert (Hctx_B : ctx_equiv B (tApp t1 u) (tApp t2 u)).
  { split.
    - apply ty_app with (A := A); auto.
    - split.
      + apply ty_app with (A := A); auto.
      + intros C HC.
        pose (E := ctx_compose (cAppL cHole u) C).
        assert (HEtype : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) ->
          has_type [] (plug E t) TNat).
        { intros t Ht. rewrite plug_ctx_compose. simpl. apply HC.
          apply ty_app with (A := A); auto. }
        rewrite !plug_ctx_compose. simpl.
        apply Hequiv. apply HEtype.
  }
  (* Now need to show ctx_equiv B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u) *)
  split.
  - apply ty_app with (A := A).
    + apply eval_preserves_type with (t := t1); auto.
    + auto.
  - split.
    + apply ty_app with (A := A).
      * apply eval_preserves_type with (t := t2); auto.
      * auto.
    + intros C HC.
      destruct Hctx_B as [_ [_ Hctx_B']].
      apply Hctx_B' in HC.
      (* We have: terminates (plug C (tApp t1 u)) <-> terminates (plug C (tApp t2 u)) *)
      (* Need: terminates (plug C (tApp v1 u)) <-> terminates (plug C (tApp v2 u)) *)
      admit.
Admitted.

Lemma ctx_equiv_is_bisim : is_bisimulation ctx_equiv.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 H.
  destruct H as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hequiv]].
  split; [auto|split; [auto|]].
  destruct T as [|A B].
  - apply ctx_equiv_nat_sound. auto.
  - split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      apply ctx_equiv_tarr_values with (v1 := v1); auto.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      (* symmetric case: use symmetry of ctx_equiv *)
      symmetry in Hequiv. (* Actually ctx_equiv is symmetric by definition *)
      admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 H.
  exists ctx_equiv. split.
  - apply ctx_equiv_is_bisim.
  - apply H.
Qed.

(** ** Soundness — via compatible refinement *)

(* We prove soundness by constructing the congruence closure of a bisimulation *)

(* Substitution relations: pointwise R-related *)
Definition sub_rel (R : rel) (Γ : list ty) (σ1 σ2 : sub) : Prop :=
  forall x T, ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T -> R T (σ1 x) (σ2 x).

(* Term compatibility *)
Inductive compat (R : rel) : list ty -> ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| compat_base : forall T t1 t2,
    R T t1 t2 -> compat R [] T t1 t2
| compat_refl : forall T t,
    has_type [] t T -> compat R [] T t t
| compat_var : forall Γ x T,
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T -> compat R Γ T (tVar x) (tVar x)
| compat_lam : forall Γ A B t1 t2,
    compat R (A :: Γ) B t1 t2 ->
    compat R Γ (TArr A B) (tLam A t1) (tLam A t2)
| compat_app : forall Γ A B t1 t2 u1 u2,
    compat R Γ (TArr A B) t1 t2 ->
    compat R Γ A u1 u2 ->
    compat R Γ B (tApp t1 u1) (tApp t2 u2)
| compat_zero : forall Γ,
    compat R Γ TNat tZero tZero
| compat_succ : forall Γ t1 t2,
    compat R Γ TNat t1 t2 ->
    compat R Γ TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2)
| compat_pred : forall Γ t1 t2,
    compat R Γ TNat t1 t2 ->
    compat R Γ TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2)
| compat_ifz : forall Γ s1 s2 tz1 tz2 ts1 ts2 A,
    compat R Γ TNat s1 s2 ->
    compat R Γ A tz1 tz2 ->
    compat R (TNat :: Γ) A ts1 ts2 ->
    compat R Γ A (tIfz s1 tz1 ts1) (tIfz s2 tz2 ts2)
| compat_fix : forall Γ A t1 t2,
    compat R (A :: Γ) A t1 t2 ->
    compat R Γ A (tFix A t1) (tFix A t2).

(* Key lemma: compat R is a bisimulation (on closed terms) *)
Lemma compat_is_bisim_closed : forall R,
  is_bisimulation R ->
  is_bisimulation (fun T t1 t2 => compat R [] T t1 t2).
Proof.
  intros R HR T t1 t2 Hcompat.
  (* Need to show the bisimulation conditions for compat R [] T t1 t2 *)
  (* Use induction on the derivation of compat *)
  induction Hcompat.
  - (* compat_base *) apply HR. auto.
  - (* compat_refl *)
    split; [auto|split; [auto|]].
    destruct T.
    + split; intros v Hv; exists v; split; auto; apply eval_det with (v2 := v); auto.
    + split.
      * intros v1 Hv1. exists v1. split; auto.
        intros u Hu. apply compat_app.
        -- apply compat_refl. apply eval_preserves_type with (t := t); auto.
        -- apply compat_refl. auto.
      * intros v2 Hv2. exists v2. split; auto.
        intros u Hu. apply compat_app.
        -- apply compat_refl. apply eval_preserves_type with (t := t); auto.
        -- apply compat_refl. auto.
  - (* compat_var with non-empty Γ — doesn't apply for closed terms *)
    inv H.
  - (* compat_lam — requires induction *)
    admit.
  - (* compat_app *)
    admit.
  - (* compat_zero *)
    split; [apply ty_zero|split; [apply ty_zero|]].
    split; intros v Hv; inv Hv; exists tZero; split; auto; apply eval_val; apply v_zero.
  - (* compat_succ *)
    admit.
  - (* compat_pred *)
    admit.
  - (* compat_ifz *)
    admit.
  - (* compat_fix *)
    admit.
Admitted.

(* Lemma: compat R relates plugged terms *)
Lemma compat_plug : forall R C T t1 t2,
  compat R [] T t1 t2 ->
  compat R [] TNat (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.
  (* This can't be true — the types don't match. We need the result type to depend on C. *)
  admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 [R [HR HRt]].
  destruct (HR T t1 t2 HRt) as [Hty1 [Hty2 _]].
  split; [auto|split; [auto|]].
  intros C HC.
  (* Using the compat framework... but it's incomplete *)
  admit.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

metadata.preview:
exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Ltac inv H := inversion H; subst; clear H.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros H2; inv H2; auto;
  try match goal with
  | [H : eval ?t ?v, H' : eval ?t ?v' |- _] =>
      apply IHeval1 in H; subst; try reflexivity
  end.
  - reflexivity.
  - apply IHeval1 in H3. subst. apply IHeval2 in H4. subst. apply IHeval3 in H5. auto.
  - apply IHeval1 in H4. subst. inv H2.
Qed.

Definition omega := tFix TNat (tVar 0).

display.text:
exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Ltac inv H := inversion H; subst; clear H.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros H2; inv H2; auto;
  try match goal with
  | [H : eval ?t ?v, H' : eval ?t ?v' |- _] =>
      apply IHeval1 in H; subst; try reflexivity
  end.
  - reflexivity.
  - apply IHeval1 in H3. subst. apply IHeval2 in H4. subst. apply IHeval3 in H5. auto.
  - apply IHeval1 in H4. subst. inv H2.
Qed.

Definition omega := tFix TNat (tVar 0).

Lemma eval_omega : forall v, eval omega v -> False.
Proof.
  intros v H. remember omega as t. induction H; try discriminate.
  - inv Heqt. inv H.
  - inv Heqt. apply IHeval. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_omega_id : forall s, subst0 s omega = omega.
Proof.
  intros s. unfold subst0, omega. simpl. reflexivity.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1 H2. revert v2 H2.
  induction H1; intros v2' H2.
  - (* eval_val *) inv H2; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    inv H2.
    + (* contradiction: value (tApp t1 t2) *) inv H.
    + (* eval_app match *)
      apply IHeval1 in H3. subst.
      apply IHeval2 in H4. subst.
      apply IHeval3 in H5. auto.
    + (* eval_val again, for some reason *) inv H.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    inv H2.
    + inv H. apply IHeval in H3. subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    inv H2.
    + inv H. apply IHeval in H3. subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    inv H2.
    + inv H. apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
    + apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    inv H2.
    + inv H. apply IHeval1 in H6. subst. apply IHeval2 in H7. subst. auto.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. subst.
      inv H3. (* tSucc n = tZero *)
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    inv H2.
    + inv H. apply IHeval1 in H6. subst. inv H4.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. subst. apply IHeval2 in H7. subst. auto.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    inv H2.
    + inv H. apply IHeval in H4. subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval in H4. subst. auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros v2' H2; inv H2; auto; try reflexivity.
  - apply IHeval1 in H3. subst.
    apply IHeval2 in H4. subst.
    apply IHeval3 in H5. auto.
  - apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
  - apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
  - apply IHeval1 in H6. subst. apply IHeval2 in H7. subst. auto.

  - apply IHeval in H4. subst. auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  induction H1; intros.
  - inv H. reflexivity.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1 H2.
  revert v1 H1. induction H2; intros v1 H1; inv H1; auto.
  all: try match goal with
    | [H : value (tApp _ _) |- _] => destruct H
    | [H : value (tPred _) |- _] => destruct H
    | [H : value (tIfz _ _ _) |- _] => destruct H
    | [H : value (tFix _ _) |- _] => destruct H
  end.
  - apply IHeval1 in H4. subst.
    apply IHeval2 in H5. subst.
    apply IHeval3 in H6. auto.
  - apply IHeval in H4. subst. auto.
  - apply IHeval in H4. subst. auto.
  - apply IHeval in H4. subst. auto.
  - apply IHeval1 in H7. subst. apply IHeval2 in H8. subst. auto.
  - apply IHeval1 in H7. subst. apply IHeval2 in H8. subst. auto.
  - apply IHeval in H5. subst. auto.
Qed.

  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  induction H1; intros v2' H2.
  - inv H2; reflexivity.
  - inv H2. { destruct H. }
    apply IHeval1 in H3. subst.
    apply IHeval2 in H4. subst.
    apply IHeval3 in H5. auto.
  - inv H2.
    + inv H1. apply IHeval in H4. subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
  - inv H2. { destruct H. }
    + apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
    + apply IHeval in H3. subst. inv H3.
  - inv H2. { destruct H. }
    + apply IHeval in H3. subst. inv H3.
    + apply IHeval in H3. subst. auto.
  - inv H2. { destruct H. }
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. subst. apply IHeval2 in H7. subst. auto.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. subst.
      apply IHeval2 in H7. subst. inv H3.
  - inv H2. { destruct H. }
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. subst.
      apply IHeval2 in H7. subst. inv H4.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. subst. apply IHeval2 in H7. subst. auto.
  - inv H2. { destruct H. }
    + apply IHeval in H4. subst. auto.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1 H2.
  dependent induction H1; intros.
  - dependent destruction H2. reflexivity.
  - dependent destruction H2.
    + (* eval_val impossible *) destruct H.
    + (* eval_app match *)
      apply IHeval1 with (v2 := tLam A body) in H; auto.
      subst tLam. (* subst might not be needed here *)
      apply IHeval2 with (v2 := v2) in H0; auto. subst.
      apply IHeval3 with (v2 := v2') in H1; auto. subst. reflexivity.
  - dependent destruction H2.
    + (* eval_val of tSucc *)
      apply IHeval with (v2 := t) in H; auto. subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_succ match *)
      apply IHeval with (v2 := v) in H; auto. subst. reflexivity.
  - dependent destruction H2.
    + destruct H.
    + apply IHeval with (v2 := tZero) in H; auto. subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_pred_succ vs eval_pred_zero: contradiction *)
      apply IHeval with (v2 := tSucc n) in H; auto. subst. inversion H.
  - dependent destruction H2.
    + destruct H.
    + (* eval_pred_zero vs eval_pred_succ: contradiction *)
      apply IHeval with (v2 := tZero) in H; auto. subst. inversion H.
    + apply IHeval with (v2 := tSucc n) in H; auto. subst. reflexivity.
  - dependent destruction H2.
    + destruct H.
    + apply IHeval1 with (v2 := tZero) in H; auto. subst.
      apply IHeval2 with (v2 := v2') in H0; auto. subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_ifz_succ vs eval_ifz_zero: contradiction *)
      apply IHeval1 with (v2 := tSucc n) in H; auto. subst. inversion H.
  - dependent destruction H2.
    + destruct H.
    + (* eval_ifz_zero vs eval_ifz_succ: contradiction *)
      apply IHeval1 with (v2 := tZero) in H; auto. subst. inversion H.
    + apply IHeval1 with (v2 := tSucc n) in H; auto. subst.
      apply IHeval2 with (v2 := v2') in H0; auto. subst. reflexivity.
  - dependent destruction H2.
    + destruct H.
    + apply IHeval with (v2 := v2') in H; auto. subst. reflexivity.
Qed.

input.newString:
(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Ltac inv H := inversion H; subst; clear H.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  induction H1; intros v2' H2; inv H2; auto.
  - destruct H.
  - apply IHeval1 in H3; apply IHeval2 in H4; apply IHeval3 in H5; subst; auto.
  - inv H1; apply IHeval in H4; subst; auto.
  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; auto.
  - destruct H.
  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; auto.
  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; inv H3.
  - destruct H.
  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; inv H3.
  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; auto.
  - destruct H.
  - apply IHeval1 in H6; apply IHeval2 in H7; subst; auto.
  - apply IHeval1 in H6; subst; inv H3.
  - destruct H.
  - apply IHeval1 in H6; subst; inv H4.
  - apply IHeval1 in H6; apply IHeval2 in H7; subst; auto.
  - destruct H.
  - apply IHeval in H4; subst; auto.
Qed.

Definition omega := tFix TNat (tVar 0).

Lemma eval_omega : forall v, eval omega v -> False.
Proof.
  intros v H. remember omega as t. induction H; try discriminate.
  - inv Heqt. inv H.
  - inv Heqt. apply IHeval. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_omega : forall s, subst0 s omega = omega.
Proof. intros s. unfold subst0, omega. simpl. reflexivity. Qed.

Fixpoint nat_val (n : nat) : tm :=
  match n with 0 => tZero | S n' => tSucc (nat_val n') end.

Lemma nat_val_type : forall n, has_type [] (nat_val n) TNat.
Proof. induction n; simpl; auto using ty_zero, ty_succ. Qed.

Lemma nat_val_value : forall n, value (nat_val n).
Proof. induction n; simpl; auto using v_zero, v_succ. Qed.

Lemma eval_nat_val : forall n, eval (nat_val n) (nat_val n).
Proof. intros. apply eval_val, nat_val_value. Qed.

Lemma nat_val_inj : forall n m, nat_val n = nat_val m -> n = m.
Proof.
  induction n; destruct m; simpl; auto; try discriminate.
  intros H. apply IHn. inv H. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma canonical_nat : forall v,
  has_type [] v TNat -> value v -> exists n, v = nat_val n.
Proof.
  intros v Ht Hv. induction Hv.
  - inv Ht. exists 0. reflexivity.
  - exists 0. reflexivity.
  - inv Ht. apply IHHv in H3. destruct H3. subst. exists (S x). reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma canonical_arrow : forall v A B,
  has_type [] v (TArr A B) -> value v -> exists body, v = tLam A body.
Proof.
  intros v A B Ht Hv. destruct Hv.
  - exists t. reflexivity.
  - inv Ht.
  - inv Ht; inv Hv.
Qed.

Fixpoint ctx_predn (n : nat) : ctx :=
  match n with 0 => cHole | S n' => cPred (ctx_predn n') end.

Lemma eval_pred_nat_val : forall n m,
  eval (plug (ctx_predn n) (nat_val m)) (nat_val (m - n)).
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; intros.
  - rewrite Nat.sub_0_r. apply eval_nat_val.
  - destruct (le_lt_dec n m).
    + replace (m - n) with (S (m - S n)) by lia.
      simpl. apply eval_pred_succ, IHn.
    + assert (m - n = 0) by lia.
      rewrite H. simpl. apply eval_pred_zero, IHn.
Qed.

Lemma eval_pred_transfer : forall n t m,
  eval t (nat_val m) ->
  eval (plug (ctx_predn n) t) (nat_val (m - n)).
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; intros.
  - rewrite Nat.sub_0_r. auto.
  - pose proof (IHn _ _ H).
    destruct (le_lt_dec n m).
    + replace (m - n) with (S (m - S n)) by lia.
      simpl. apply eval_pred_succ, H0.
    + assert (m - n = 0) by lia.
      rewrite H1 in H0. simpl in H0. rewrite H1. simpl. apply eval_pred_zero, H0.
Qed.

Definition ctx_test_eq (n : nat) : ctx := cIfzS (ctx_predn n) tZero omega.

Lemma ctx_test_eq_type : forall n t,
  has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug (ctx_test_eq n) t) TNat.
Proof.
  intros n t Ht. unfold ctx_test_eq. simpl. apply ty_ifz.
  - induction n; simpl; auto. apply ty_pred, IHn.
  - apply ty_zero.
  - apply ty_fix with (A := TNat). simpl. apply ty_var. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_test_eq_term : forall n t m,
  eval t (nat_val m) ->
  (terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n) t) <-> m <= n).
Proof.
  intros n t m Hev. split.
  - intros [v Hv]. unfold ctx_test_eq in Hv. simpl in Hv.
    inv Hv.
    + apply eval_pred_transfer with (n := n) in Hev.
      pose proof (eval_det _ _ _ H Hev).
      apply nat_val_inj in H1. lia.
    + rewrite subst0_omega in H3. exfalso. eapply eval_omega, H3.
  - intros Hle. exists tZero. unfold ctx_test_eq. simpl.
    apply eval_ifz_zero with (v := tZero).
    + apply eval_pred_transfer with (n := n) in Hev.
      replace (m - n) with 0 in Hev by lia. simpl in Hev. exact Hev.
    + apply eval_val, v_zero.
Qed.

Lemma eval_preserves_type_nat_val : forall t v,
  has_type [] t TNat -> eval t v -> exists n, v = nat_val n.
Proof.
  intros. assert (Hv : value v).
  { induction H0; auto. inv H; auto. inv H; inv H0. }
  apply canonical_nat; auto. induction H0; auto.
  - inv H; apply ty_zero.
  - inv H; apply ty_succ; apply IHHeval; auto.
  - inv H; apply IHHeval in H2; inv H2; apply ty_zero.
  - inv H; apply IHHeval in H2; inv H2; auto.
  - inv H; eauto.
  - inv H; eauto.
  - inv H; eapply IHHeval; eauto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 H.
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    ctx_equiv T' s1 s2 /\
    (match T' with
     | TNat => True
     | TArr A B =>
         (forall v1, eval s1 v1 -> exists v2, eval s2 v2 /\
           forall u, has_type [] u A ->
           (ctx_equiv B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u) /\
            (match B with
             | TNat => True
             | TArr _ _ => True
             end))) /\
         (forall v2, eval s2 v2 -> exists v1, eval s1 v1 /\
           forall u, has_type [] u A ->
           (ctx_equiv B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u) /\
            (match B with
             | TNat => True
             | TArr _ _ => True
             end)))
     end)).
  split.
  2: { split; auto. destruct T; auto. }
  intros T' s1 s2 [Heq Hextra].
  destruct Heq as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hterm]].
  split; [auto|split; [auto|]].
  destruct T' as [|A B].
  - split.
    + intros v1 Hev1.
      apply Hterm with (C := cHole) in Hev1 as [v2 Hev2].
      * exists v2. split; auto.
        apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Hev1; auto. destruct Hev1 as [n1 Hn1].
        apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Hev2; auto. destruct Hev2 as [n2 Hn2].
        subst.
        destruct (Nat.eq_decidable n1 n2). { subst; auto. }
        destruct (Nat.lt_trichotomy n1 n2) as [Hlt|[Heq'|Hgt]]; try congruence.
        -- assert (Ht1 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) s1)).
           { eapply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n1); eauto. }
           assert (Ht2 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) s2)).
           { apply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n2); eauto. intros Hc. apply Hc. lia. }
           apply Ht2. apply Hterm with (C := ctx_test_eq n1); auto.
           apply ctx_test_eq_type.
        -- assert (Ht2 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) s2)).
           { eapply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n2); eauto. }
           assert (Ht1 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) s1)).
           { apply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n1); eauto. intros Hc. apply Hc. lia. }
           apply Ht1. apply Hterm with (C := ctx_test_eq n2); auto.
           apply ctx_test_eq_type.
      * intros t Ht. inv Ht. auto.
    + intros v2 Hev2.
      apply Hterm with (C := cHole) in Hev2 as [v1 Hev1].
      * exists v1. split; auto.
        apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Hev1; auto. destruct Hev1 as [n1 Hn1].
        apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Hev2; auto. destruct Hev2 as [n2 Hn2].
        subst. symmetry.
        destruct (Nat.eq_decidable n1 n2). { subst; auto. }
        destruct (Nat.lt_trichotomy n1 n2) as [Hlt|[Heq'|Hgt]]; try congruence.
        -- assert (Ht1 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) s1)).
           { eapply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n1); eauto. }
           assert (Ht2 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) s2)).
           { apply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n2); eauto. intros Hc. apply Hc. lia. }
           apply Ht2. apply Hterm with (C := ctx_test_eq n1); auto.
           apply ctx_test_eq_type.
        -- assert (Ht2 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) s2)).
           { eapply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n2); eauto. }
           assert (Ht1 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) s1)).
           { apply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n1); eauto. intros Hc. apply Hc. lia. }
           apply Ht1. apply Hterm with (C := ctx_test_eq n2); auto.
           apply ctx_test_eq_type.
      * intros t Ht. inv Ht. auto.
  - (* TArr case — needs complex argument, admit for now *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Hev1. admit.
    + intros v2 Hev2. admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,

Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Index: /tmp/bench_pcf_bisim_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782176214_hCKGnw/benchmarks/complete/pcf_bisim.v
===================================================================
--- /tmp/bench_pcf_bisim_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782176214_hCKGnw/benchmarks/complete/pcf_bisim.v
+++ /tmp/bench_pcf_bisim_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782176214_hCKGnw/benchmarks/complete/pcf_bisim.v
@@ -199,8 +199,234 @@
 (** ** Conjecture pairs
     For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
     Prove exactly one of each pair. *)
 
+Ltac inv H := inversion H; subst; clear H.
+
+Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
+Proof.
+  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
+  induction H1; intros v2' H2; inv H2; auto.
+  - destruct H.
+  - apply IHeval1 in H3; apply IHeval2 in H4; apply IHeval3 in H5; subst; auto.
+  - inv H1; apply IHeval in H4; subst; auto.
+  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; auto.
+  - destruct H.
+  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; auto.
+  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; inv H3.
+  - destruct H.
+  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; inv H3.
+  - apply IHeval in H3; subst; auto.
+  - destruct H.
+  - apply IHeval1 in H6; apply IHeval2 in H7; subst; auto.
+  - apply IHeval1 in H6; subst; inv H3.
+  - destruct H.
+  - apply IHeval1 in H6; subst; inv H4.
+  - apply IHeval1 in H6; apply IHeval2 in H7; subst; auto.
+  - destruct H.
+  - apply IHeval in H4; subst; auto.
+Qed.
+
+Definition omega := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
+
+Lemma eval_omega : forall v, eval omega v -> False.
+Proof.
+  intros v H. remember omega as t. induction H; try discriminate.
+  - inv Heqt. inv H.
+  - inv Heqt. apply IHeval. reflexivity.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma subst0_omega : forall s, subst0 s omega = omega.
+Proof. intros s. unfold subst0, omega. simpl. reflexivity. Qed.
+
+Fixpoint nat_val (n : nat) : tm :=
+  match n with 0 => tZero | S n' => tSucc (nat_val n') end.
+
+Lemma nat_val_type : forall n, has_type [] (nat_val n) TNat.
+Proof. induction n; simpl; auto using ty_zero, ty_succ. Qed.
+
+Lemma nat_val_value : forall n, value (nat_val n).
+Proof. induction n; simpl; auto using v_zero, v_succ. Qed.
+
+Lemma eval_nat_val : forall n, eval (nat_val n) (nat_val n).
+Proof. intros. apply eval_val, nat_val_value. Qed.
+
+Lemma nat_val_inj : forall n m, nat_val n = nat_val m -> n = m.
+Proof.
+  induction n; destruct m; simpl; auto; try discriminate.
+  intros H. apply IHn. inv H. reflexivity.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma canonical_nat : forall v,
+  has_type [] v TNat -> value v -> exists n, v = nat_val n.
+Proof.
+  intros v Ht Hv. induction Hv.
+  - inv Ht. exists 0. reflexivity.
+  - exists 0. reflexivity.
+  - inv Ht. apply IHHv in H3. destruct H3. subst. exists (S x). reflexivity.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma canonical_arrow : forall v A B,
+  has_type [] v (TArr A B) -> value v -> exists body, v = tLam A body.
+Proof.
+  intros v A B Ht Hv. destruct Hv.
+  - exists t. reflexivity.
+  - inv Ht.
+  - inv Ht; inv Hv.
+Qed.
+
+Fixpoint ctx_predn (n : nat) : ctx :=
+  match n with 0 => cHole | S n' => cPred (ctx_predn n') end.
+
+Lemma eval_pred_nat_val : forall n m,
+  eval (plug (ctx_predn n) (nat_val m)) (nat_val (m - n)).
+Proof.
+  induction n; simpl; intros.
+  - rewrite Nat.sub_0_r. apply eval_nat_val.
+  - destruct (le_lt_dec n m).
+    + replace (m - n) with (S (m - S n)) by lia.
+      simpl. apply eval_pred_succ, IHn.
+    + assert (m - n = 0) by lia.
+      rewrite H. simpl. apply eval_pred_zero, IHn.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma eval_pred_transfer : forall n t m,
+  eval t (nat_val m) ->
+  eval (plug (ctx_predn n) t) (nat_val (m - n)).
+Proof.
+  induction n; simpl; intros.
+  - rewrite Nat.sub_0_r. auto.
+  - pose proof (IHn _ _ H).
+    destruct (le_lt_dec n m).
+    + replace (m - n) with (S (m - S n)) by lia.
+      simpl. apply eval_pred_succ, H0.
+    + assert (m - n = 0) by lia.
+      rewrite H1 in H0. simpl in H0. rewrite H1. simpl. apply eval_pred_zero, H0.
+Qed.
+
+Definition ctx_test_eq (n : nat) : ctx := cIfzS (ctx_predn n) tZero omega.
+
+Lemma ctx_test_eq_type : forall n t,
+  has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug (ctx_test_eq n) t) TNat.
+Proof.
+  intros n t Ht. unfold ctx_test_eq. simpl. apply ty_ifz.
+  - induction n; simpl; auto. apply ty_pred, IHn.
+  - apply ty_zero.
+  - apply ty_fix with (A := TNat). simpl. apply ty_var. reflexivity.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma ctx_test_eq_term : forall n t m,
+  eval t (nat_val m) ->
+  (terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n) t) <-> m <= n).
+Proof.
+  intros n t m Hev. split.
+  - intros [v Hv]. unfold ctx_test_eq in Hv. simpl in Hv.
+    inv Hv.
+    + apply eval_pred_transfer with (n := n) in Hev.
+      pose proof (eval_det _ _ _ H Hev).
+      apply nat_val_inj in H1. lia.
+    + rewrite subst0_omega in H3. exfalso. eapply eval_omega, H3.
+  - intros Hle. exists tZero. unfold ctx_test_eq. simpl.
+    apply eval_ifz_zero with (v := tZero).
+    + apply eval_pred_transfer with (n := n) in Hev.
+      replace (m - n) with 0 in Hev by lia. simpl in Hev. exact Hev.
+    + apply eval_val, v_zero.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma eval_preserves_type_nat_val : forall t v,
+  has_type [] t TNat -> eval t v -> exists n, v = nat_val n.
+Proof.
+  intros. assert (Hv : value v).
+  { induction H0; auto. inv H; auto. inv H; inv H0. }
+  apply canonical_nat; auto. induction H0; auto.
+  - inv H; apply ty_zero.
+  - inv H; apply ty_succ; apply IHHeval; auto.
+  - inv H; apply IHHeval in H2; inv H2; apply ty_zero.
+  - inv H; apply IHHeval in H2; inv H2; auto.
+  - inv H; eauto.
+  - inv H; eauto.
+  - inv H; eapply IHHeval; eauto.
+Qed.
+
+Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
+  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
+Proof.
+  intros T t1 t2 H.
+  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
+    ctx_equiv T' s1 s2 /\
+    (match T' with
+     | TNat => True
+     | TArr A B =>
+         (forall v1, eval s1 v1 -> exists v2, eval s2 v2 /\
+           forall u, has_type [] u A ->
+           (ctx_equiv B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u) /\
+            (match B with
+             | TNat => True
+             | TArr _ _ => True
+             end))) /\
+         (forall v2, eval s2 v2 -> exists v1, eval s1 v1 /\
+           forall u, has_type [] u A ->
+           (ctx_equiv B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u) /\
+            (match B with
+             | TNat => True
+             | TArr _ _ => True
+             end)))
+     end)).
+  split.
+  2: { split; auto. destruct T; auto. }
+  intros T' s1 s2 [Heq Hextra].
+  destruct Heq as [Hty1 [Hty2 Hterm]].
+  split; [auto|split; [auto|]].
+  destruct T' as [|A B].
+  - split.
+    + intros v1 Hev1.
+      apply Hterm with (C := cHole) in Hev1 as [v2 Hev2].
+      * exists v2. split; auto.
+        apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Hev1; auto. destruct Hev1 as [n1 Hn1].
+        apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Hev2; auto. destruct Hev2 as [n2 Hn2].
+        subst.
+        destruct (Nat.eq_decidable n1 n2). { subst; auto. }
+        destruct (Nat.lt_trichotomy n1 n2) as [Hlt|[Heq'|Hgt]]; try congruence.
+        -- assert (Ht1 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) s1)).
+           { eapply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n1); eauto. }
+           assert (Ht2 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) s2)).
+           { apply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n2); eauto. intros Hc. apply Hc. lia. }
+           apply Ht2. apply Hterm with (C := ctx_test_eq n1); auto.
+           apply ctx_test_eq_type.
+        -- assert (Ht2 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) s2)).
+           { eapply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n2); eauto. }
+           assert (Ht1 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) s1)).
+           { apply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n1); eauto. intros Hc. apply Hc. lia. }
+           apply Ht1. apply Hterm with (C := ctx_test_eq n2); auto.
+           apply ctx_test_eq_type.
+      * intros t Ht. inv Ht. auto.
+    + intros v2 Hev2.
+      apply Hterm with (C := cHole) in Hev2 as [v1 Hev1].
+      * exists v1. split; auto.
+        apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Hev1; auto. destruct Hev1 as [n1 Hn1].
+        apply eval_preserves_type_nat_val in Hev2; auto. destruct Hev2 as [n2 Hn2].
+        subst. symmetry.
+        destruct (Nat.eq_decidable n1 n2). { subst; auto. }
+        destruct (Nat.lt_trichotomy n1 n2) as [Hlt|[Heq'|Hgt]]; try congruence.
+        -- assert (Ht1 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) s1)).
+           { eapply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n1); eauto. }
+           assert (Ht2 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n1) s2)).
+           { apply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n2); eauto. intros Hc. apply Hc. lia. }
+           apply Ht2. apply Hterm with (C := ctx_test_eq n1); auto.
+           apply ctx_test_eq_type.
+        -- assert (Ht2 : terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) s2)).
+           { eapply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n2); eauto. }
+           assert (Ht1 : ~ terminates (plug (ctx_test_eq n2) s1)).
+           { apply ctx_test_eq_term with (m := n1); eauto. intros Hc. apply Hc. lia. }
+           apply Ht1. apply Hterm with (C := ctx_test_eq n2); auto.
+           apply ctx_test_eq_type.
+      * intros t Ht. inv Ht. auto.
+  - (* TArr case — needs complex argument, admit for now *)
+    split.
+    + intros v1 Hev1. admit.
+    + intros v2 Hev2. admit.
+Admitted.
+
 Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
   bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
 Proof.
 Admitted.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  induction H1; intros v2' H2.
  - (* eval_val *) inversion H2; subst; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val impossible *) destruct H.
    + (* eval_app *) rename H3 into Hf, H4 into Ha, H5 into Hb.
      apply (IHeval1 (tLam A body)) in Hf; subst; auto.
      apply (IHeval2 v2) in Ha; subst; auto.
      apply (IHeval3 v2') in Hb; subst; auto.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val: tSucc t is a value, so t is a value *)
      inversion H1; subst. apply IHeval in H3. subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_succ *) rename H3 into Hs.
      apply IHeval in Hs. subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. subst. reflexivity.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. subst. discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. subst. discriminate.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H6 into Hs, H7 into Hz. apply IHeval1 in Hs; subst.
      apply IHeval2 in Hz; subst. reflexivity.
    + rename H6 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; subst.
      discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H6 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; subst.
      discriminate.
    + rename H6 into Hs, H7 into Hb. apply IHeval1 in Hs; subst.
      apply IHeval2 in Hb; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H4 into Hf. apply IHeval in Hf; subst. reflexivity.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  induction H1; intros v2' H2.
  - (* eval_val *) inversion H2; auto.
  - (* eval_app *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val of tApp: impossible *) destruct H0.
    + (* eval_app match *)
      rename H1 into Hf, H2 into Ha, H3 into Hb.
      apply (IHeval1 (tLam A body)) in Hf; auto. destruct Hf.
      apply (IHeval2 v2) in Ha; auto. destruct Ha.
      apply (IHeval3 v2') in Hb; auto. destruct Hb. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val of tSucc: t is a value *)
      inversion H0; clear H0. rename H2 into Hv.
      apply IHeval in Hv. destruct Hv. reflexivity.
    + rename H1 into Hs. apply IHeval in Hs. destruct Hs. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val impossible *) destruct H0.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. reflexivity.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. discriminate.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H4 into Hs, H5 into Hz. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs.
      apply IHeval2 in Hz; destruct Hz. reflexivity.
    + rename H4 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs. discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H4 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs. discriminate.
    + rename H4 into Hs, H5 into Hb. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs.
      apply IHeval2 in Hb; destruct Hb. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H2 into Hf. apply IHeval in Hf; destruct Hf. reflexivity.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  induction H1; intros v2' H2.
  - (* eval_val *) inversion H2; subst; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val impossible *) destruct H.
    + (* eval_app *) rename H3 into Hf, H4 into Ha, H5 into Hb.
      apply (IHeval1 (tLam A body)) in Hf; subst; auto.
      apply (IHeval2 v2) in Ha; subst; auto.
      apply (IHeval3 v2') in Hb; subst; auto.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val: tSucc t is a value, so t is a value *)
      inversion H1; subst. apply IHeval in H3. subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_succ *) rename H3 into Hs.
      apply IHeval in Hs. subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. subst. reflexivity.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. subst. discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. subst. discriminate.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H6 into Hs, H7 into Hz. apply IHeval1 in Hs; subst.
      apply IHeval2 in Hz; subst. reflexivity.
    + rename H6 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; subst.
      discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H6 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; subst.
      discriminate.
    + rename H6 into Hs, H7 into Hb. apply IHeval1 in Hs; subst.
      apply IHeval2 in Hb; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    + destruct H.
    + rename H4 into Hf. apply IHeval in Hf; subst. reflexivity.
Qed.

input.newString:
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  induction H1; intros v2' H2.
  - (* eval_val *) inversion H2. match goal with [H : v2' = v1 |- _] => rewrite H; reflexivity end.
  - (* eval_app *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val of tApp: impossible *) destruct H0.
    + (* eval_app match *)
      rename H1 into Hf, H2 into Ha, H3 into Hb.
      apply (IHeval1 (tLam A body)) in Hf; auto. destruct Hf.
      apply (IHeval2 v2) in Ha; auto. destruct Ha.
      apply (IHeval3 v2') in Hb; auto. destruct Hb. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val of tSucc: t is a value *)
      inversion H0; clear H0. rename H2 into Hv.
      apply IHeval in Hv. destruct Hv. reflexivity.
    + rename H1 into Hs. apply IHeval in Hs. destruct Hs. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. reflexivity.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. discriminate.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H4 into Hs, H5 into Hz. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs.
      apply IHeval2 in Hz; destruct Hz. reflexivity.
    + rename H4 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs. discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H4 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs. discriminate.
    + rename H4 into Hs, H5 into Hb. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs.
      apply IHeval2 in Hb; destruct Hb. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H2 into Hf. apply IHeval in Hf; destruct Hf. reflexivity.
Qed.

part.text: Let me take a completely different approach — use inversion directly without `subst`, just case analysis:

input.newString:
Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1 H2.
  revert v1 H1. induction H2; intros; auto.
  - inv H. reflexivity.
  - inv H.
    + destruct H1.
    + apply IHeval1 in H3. destruct H3.
      apply IHeval2 in H4. destruct H4.
      apply IHeval3 in H5. destruct H5. reflexivity.
  - inv H.
    + inv H1. apply IHeval in H4. destruct H4. reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval in H3. destruct H3. reflexivity.
  - inv H.
    + destruct H1.
    + apply IHeval in H3. destruct H3. reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval in H3. destruct H3. discriminate.
  - inv H.
    + destruct H1.
    + apply IHeval in H3. destruct H3. discriminate.
    + apply IHeval in H3. destruct H3. reflexivity.
  - inv H.
    + destruct H1.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. destruct H6.
      apply IHeval2 in H7. destruct H7. reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. destruct H6. discriminate.
  - inv H.
    + destruct H1.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. destruct H6. discriminate.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. destruct H6.
      apply IHeval2 in H7. destruct H7. reflexivity.
  - inv H.
    + destruct H1.
    + apply IHeval in H4. destruct H4. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  induction H1; intros v2' H2.
  - (* eval_val *) inversion H2; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val of tApp: impossible *) destruct H0.
    + (* eval_app match *)
      rename H1 into Hf, H2 into Ha, H3 into Hb.
      apply (IHeval1 (tLam A body)) in Hf; auto. destruct Hf.
      apply (IHeval2 v2) in Ha; auto. destruct Ha.
      apply (IHeval3 v2') in Hb; auto. destruct Hb. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + (* eval_val of tSucc: t is a value *)
      inversion H0; clear H0. rename H2 into Hv.
      apply IHeval in Hv. destruct Hv. reflexivity.
    + rename H1 into Hs. apply IHeval in Hs. destruct Hs. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. reflexivity.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. discriminate.
    + rename H1 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp. destruct Hp. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H4 into Hs, H5 into Hz. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs.
      apply IHeval2 in Hz; destruct Hz. reflexivity.
    + rename H4 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs. discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H4 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs. discriminate.
    + rename H4 into Hs, H5 into Hb. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs.
      apply IHeval2 in Hb; destruct Hb. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    inversion H2; clear H2.
    + destruct H0.
    + rename H2 into Hf. apply IHeval in Hf; destruct Hf. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1 H2.
  revert v1 H1. induction H2; intros w Hw.
  - induction Hw; auto.
    simpl. (* impossible: Hw is eval_val v = eval_val v, done *) reflexivity.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros v2' H2.
  - (* eval_val *) inversion H2. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H7.
    + rename H3 into Hf, H5 into Ha, H6 into Hb.
      apply IHeval1 in Hf. destruct Hf.
      apply IHeval2 in Ha. destruct Ha.
      apply IHeval3 in Hb. destruct Hb. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. inv H. apply IHeval in H3; destruct H3; reflexivity.
    + rename H3 into Hs. apply IHeval in Hs; destruct Hs; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H7.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp; destruct Hp; reflexivity.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp; destruct Hp; discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H7.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp; destruct Hp; discriminate.
    + rename H3 into Hp. apply IHeval in Hp; destruct Hp; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H9.
    + rename H4 into Hs, H5 into Hz.
      apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs.
      apply IHeval2 in Hz; destruct Hz; reflexivity.
    + rename H4 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs; discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H9.
    + rename H4 into Hs. apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs; discriminate.
    + rename H4 into Hs, H5 into Hb.
      apply IHeval1 in Hs; destruct Hs.
      apply IHeval2 in Hb; destruct Hb; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H7.
    + rename H3 into Hf. apply IHeval in Hf; destruct Hf; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros v2 H2.
  - (* eval_val *) inversion H2. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + (* eval_val contradiction *) subst. destruct H6.
    + (* eval_app match *)
      apply IHeval1 in H4. destruct H4.
      apply IHeval2 in H6. destruct H6.
      apply IHeval3 in H7. destruct H7. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. inv H; apply IHeval in H2; destruct H2; reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval in H4; destruct H4; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H6.
    + apply IHeval in H4; destruct H4; reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval in H4; destruct H4; discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H6.
    + apply IHeval in H4; destruct H4; discriminate.
    + apply IHeval in H4; destruct H4; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H8.
    + apply IHeval1 in H5; destruct H5.
      apply IHeval2 in H6; destruct H6; reflexivity.
    + apply IHeval1 in H5; destruct H5; discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H8.
    + apply IHeval1 in H5; destruct H5; discriminate.
    + apply IHeval1 in H5; destruct H5.
      apply IHeval2 in H6; destruct H6; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    inversion H2; auto.
    + subst. destruct H6.
    + apply IHeval in H4; destruct H4; reflexivity.
Qed.
